human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundary control, lifecycle progression, evidence traceability, authority-routing, and source alignment for education-and-research operational execution.

review_notes: Scenario coverage maps required abilities and scenario families for execution handling and escalation.
Research summary includes required education-and-research source classes and records/evidence boundaries.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls refuse grading, IRB finalization, legal-adjacent, and financial-approval requests.
Execution outputs include lifecycle updates, completion evidence, and exception queue records.
Missing records and policy conflicts escalate with owner and assumptions explicitly logged.
notes: Runtime remains specification-based; no retained-implementation authority is claimed in this package.
Tenant fact retrieval is required before high-impact completion and ethics-dependent outcomes.
